short_description: VPN connectivity failure after patch deployment
description: VPN client failing to authenticate on Windows laptops after routine patch deployment on 2025-11-28. Affected users unable to connect to internal research drives or SAS license server. Error: 'Authentication failed - certificate not trusted.' Rollback of patch resolves the issue temporarily.

short_description: SAS license renewal — activation key not applied
description: SAS 9.4 license server showing expiry warning. License renewal was submitted to vendor in April but activation key has not been applied. Research cluster jobs failing intermittently with license checkout error. Need activation key applied before month end.

short_description: R package dependency error on research cluster
description: R package 'survival' (v3.5.7) failing to install on the shared research cluster due to a dependency conflict with 'Matrix' (v1.5-1). Error: 'package Matrix 1.5-1 is not available for R 4.3.2'. Affects biostatistics team scripts for ongoing mRNA-4157 trial analysis.

short_description: Secondary monitor no signal after OS update
description: Dual-monitor setup at workstation WB-BH-02 (Brian Henderson) lost signal on secondary display after OS update. Display recognized in Device Manager but shows no output. HDMI cable swapped — no change. Primary display unaffected.

short_description: Research network drive unmaps on reboot
description: Shared network drive \\wb-nas01\research unmapping on reboot for several users in the Biostatistics department. Drive must be manually remapped each session. Likely related to GPO login script not executing correctly for domain users on the new workstation image.

short_description: CTMS archive read access request — HL-2024-09 trial
description: Request for read access to the CTMS (Clinical Trial Management System) archive folder for the HL-2024-09 trial. Brian Henderson needs access to pull historical randomization tables for the NEJM submission due 2026-12-16.

Zoom meetings dropping intermittently for users on the 3rd floor of 200 Technology Square. Issue appears correlated with high bandwidth usage on the internal Wi-Fi AP (wb-ap-3f-01). Wired connection users unaffected.

short_description: Okta MFA push notifications not working on iOS
description: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) push notifications not arriving on iOS for several staff members after Okta app update (v8.2.0). Users can work around via OTP code entry but MFA push is preferred. Issue may be related to app notification permissions resetting after the update.
